# Council Escalation Failure-Mode Audit

*Generated by `audit.py` over `council_escalations_resolved[]` (65 resolved escalations).*

## Method

Each resolved escalation is classified on three orthogonal axes by priority-ordered regex (keyword-based, therefore approximate):

1. **Failure-mode class** — what triggered the escalation (matched on `reason`).
2. **Objecting angle(s)** — which lens(es) objected (all matches collected).
3. **Resolution disposition** — `accepted_fix` (real signal), `false_positive` (noise), `partial` (mixed), or `ambiguous`.

**Signal-to-noise ratio (SNR)** per class = `accepted_fix / (accepted_fix + false_positive)`. `partial`/`ambiguous` rows are excluded from the SNR denominator (shown as separate columns). Rows that fall through to `uncategorized`/`ambiguous` are surfaced below for manual correction.

## Failure modes (signal-to-noise per class)

| Failure mode | Count | Detecting rule | accepted_fix | false_positive | partial | ambiguous | SNR |
|---|---:|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| `two_attempt_unresolved` | 44 | reason ~ /unresolved objections after 2 attempts/ | 18 | 13 | 7 | 6 | 58% |
| `uncategorized` | 8 | (no failure-mode rule matched — manual review) | 3 | 3 | 0 | 2 | 50% |
| `goalpost_move` | 5 | reason ~ /goalpost|same argument|escalated X→Y with same|re-escalat/ | 1 | 4 | 0 | 0 | 20% |
| `lessons_veto` | 5 | reason ~ /LESSONS VETO/ | 0 | 2 | 2 | 1 | 0% |
| `deadlock` | 2 | reason ~ /attempt 3|deadlock|3rd consecutive/ | 2 | 0 | 0 | 0 | 100% |
| `parse_failure` | 1 | reason ~ /unparseable|parse failure|phantom/ | 0 | 1 | 0 | 0 | 0% |

## Example per class

- **`two_attempt_unresolved`** — _markdown-deck / implementation_: Unresolved objections after 2 attempts — SECURITY OBJECT (high, XSS in renderMath \text{}/\mathbf{} + table cells) + GUIDE OBJECT (medium, chart-block rules missing from ai-prompt-content).
- **`uncategorized`** — _naval-scribe / implementation_: Unresolved objections after 3 attempts — UI OBJECT (high): status badges and filter buttons have insufficient tap target sizes for mobile touch interaction.
- **`goalpost_move`** — _experiments/adopt-planning-mode / plan_: Attempt 3: BUGS+SECURITY deadlock. SECURITY escalated medium→high with same argument (plan.md unsanitized). BUGS bandwagoned (was APPROVE on attempts 1+2). 5 of 7 APPROVE.
- **`lessons_veto`** — _naval-scribe / implementation_: LESSONS VETO — Cannot verify implementation of `saveAddr()` and `renderAddr()` as required by the `ACTIVE OVERRIDE` and `COUNCIL FOCUS` due to truncated JavaScript in the provided deliverable.
- **`deadlock`** — _port-ref / tests_: BUGS: search substring not matching (sql does not find mssql) — 2-attempt deadlock
- **`parse_failure`** — _experiments/infra-yolo-evals / implementation_: Unresolved objections after 3 attempts — BUGS OBJECT (high, table-overflow false-negative: overflow-x:auto anywhere in file accepted even if on unrelated element) + SECURITY OBJECT (high, unparseab...

## By gate

| Gate | Escalations |
|---|---:|
| implementation | 23 |
| plan | 21 |
| tests | 15 |
| outcome | 6 |

## By objecting angle

| Angle | Times it objected |
|---|---:|
| BUGS | 26 |
| SECURITY | 17 |
| UI | 11 |
| GUIDE | 6 |
| LESSONS | 6 |
| COOL | 2 |
| USEFULNESS | 1 |

## Overall disposition

| Disposition | Count |
|---|---:|
| accepted_fix | 24 |
| false_positive | 23 |
| partial | 9 |
| ambiguous | 9 |

**Overall SNR** (accepted_fix vs false_positive) = `51%` (24 signal / 23 noise).

## Recommendations

- `goalpost_move` has low SNR (20%) over 5 cases — candidate for a tighter auto-downgrade rule (mostly noise).
- `lessons_veto` has low SNR (0%) over 5 cases — candidate for a tighter auto-downgrade rule (mostly noise).
- 8 escalation(s) are `uncategorized` — extend the failure-mode rules or hand-label them.
- 9 resolution(s) are `ambiguous` — the disposition classifier could not score signal vs noise; review by hand.
